options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Reported HCF 6 instead of LCM. LCM is the least common multiple, not the greatest common factor.
options.trap_reason_hi: HCF 6 को LCM मान लिया। LCM least common multiple होता है, greatest factor नहीं।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Added the numbers: 18+24=42. LCM is found from prime powers, not addition.
options.trap_reason_hi: संख्याएँ जोड़ दीं: 18+24=42। LCM prime powers से निकलता है।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Picked the larger number 24. It is not divisible by both numbers in this pair.
options.trap_reason_hi: बड़ी संख्या 24 चुन ली। यह दोनों numbers से divisible नहीं है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Use LCM × HCF = product. HCF(18,24) = 6. LCM = 18×24/6 = 72. Therefore, answer = 72.
questions.explanation_concept_en: For two positive integers, HCF captures the common part and LCM captures each prime factor at its maximum power. Their product equals the product of the two numbers. Final answer is 72.
questions.explanation_method_hi: LCM × HCF = product लगाएँ। HCF(18,24) = 6। LCM = 18×24/6 = 72। अतः answer = 72।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: दो positive integers में HCF common part लेता है और LCM हर prime factor की maximum power लेता है। इसलिए LCM × HCF = product। Final answer 72 है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Euclid method: repeatedly subtract/reduce common parts; HCF(84,132) = 12. Therefore, answer = 12.
questions.explanation_concept_en: HCF is the largest number that divides both given numbers exactly. Prime factorisation or Euclid's algorithm both isolate this common divisor. Final answer is 12.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Euclid method से common divisor निकालें; HCF(84,132) = 12। अतः answer = 12।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: HCF सबसे बड़ी संख्या है जो दोनों numbers को exactly divide करती है। Prime factorisation या Euclid method दोनों same common divisor देते हैं। Final answer 12 है।

questions.stem_en: What is the remainder when 347 is divided by 9?
questions.stem_hi: 347 को 9 से divide करने पर remainder क्या होगा?

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Reported quotient 38 instead of remainder. Remainder is the leftover after full groups of 9.
options.trap_reason_hi: Quotient 38 को remainder लिख दिया। Remainder 9 के full groups के बाद बचा हिस्सा है।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Used complement 9-5=4. The asked remainder is 5, not its distance from the divisor.
options.trap_reason_hi: Complement 9-5=4 ले लिया। Remainder 5 है, divisor से distance नहीं।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Assumed exact divisibility. 9×38=342, leaving 5.
options.trap_reason_hi: Exact divisibility मान ली। 9×38=342, इसलिए 5 बचता है।

questions.explanation_concept_en: Division means dividend = divisor × quotient + remainder, with remainder smaller than the divisor. Here the leftover is the required value. Final answer is 5.
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Division में dividend = divisor × quotient + remainder होता है, और remainder divisor से छोटा होता है। यहाँ बचा हुआ हिस्सा answer है। Final answer 5 है।

options.label: C

options.trap_reason_hi: गलत cycle position ले ली। Exponent 42 को cycle length से reduce करना होता है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Unit digits of powers of 7 repeat cyclically. Put exponent 42 into that cycle; the selected unit digit is 9. Therefore, answer = 9.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Only the last digit matters for a unit digit problem. Multiplying last digits repeatedly creates a short repeating cycle, so large powers reduce to a cycle position. Final answer is 9.
questions.explanation_method_hi: 7 की powers का unit digit cycle में repeat होता है। Exponent 42 को cycle में रखकर unit digit 9 मिलता है। अतः answer = 9।

questions.explanation_method_en: Unit digits of powers of 3 repeat cyclically. Put exponent 58 into that cycle; the selected unit digit is 9. Therefore, answer = 9.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Only the last digit matters for a unit digit problem. Multiplying last digits repeatedly creates a short repeating cycle, so large powers reduce to a cycle position. Final answer is 9.
questions.explanation_method_hi: 3 की powers का unit digit cycle में repeat होता है। Exponent 58 को cycle में रखकर unit digit 9 मिलता है। अतः answer = 9।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Unit digit problem में सिर्फ last digit matter करता है। Last digits multiply करते हुए छोटा repeating cycle बनाते हैं। Final answer 9 है।

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Used the base unit digit 9 without applying the power cycle. Unit digits repeat in cycles.
options.trap_reason_hi: Base unit digit 9 सीधे ले लिया। Powers में unit digit cycle repeat होता है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Used the exponent's unit digit 8. The exponent chooses the cycle position; it is not itself the answer.
options.trap_reason_hi: Exponent का unit digit 8 ले लिया। Exponent cycle position बताता है, answer नहीं।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Shifted to the wrong cycle position. The exponent 38 must be reduced by the cycle length, not by 10 alone.
options.trap_reason_hi: गलत cycle position ले ली। Exponent 38 को cycle length से reduce करना होता है।

questions.stem_en: The first part of a quantity is 420, and it is 7 times the second part. Find the second part.
questions.stem_hi: किसी quantity का पहला भाग 420 है और यह दूसरे भाग का 7 गुना है। दूसरा भाग ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Reported the given first part 420. The question asks for the second part.
options.trap_reason_hi: दिया हुआ पहला भाग 420 लिख दिया। Question दूसरा भाग पूछता है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Reported the multiplier 7 as the part. The multiplier is not the value of the part.
options.trap_reason_hi: Multiplier 7 को ही part मान लिया। Multiplier value नहीं है।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Treated 420 as the total and divided by 8. Here 420 is already the first part, so second part = 420/7.
options.trap_reason_hi: 420 को total मानकर 8 से divide किया। यहाँ 420 पहला भाग है, इसलिए दूसरा भाग = 420/7।

questions.explanation_method_en: Let the second part be x. First part = 7x = 420; so x = 420/7 = 60. Therefore, answer = 60.
questions.explanation_concept_en: When one quantity is described as a multiple of another, assign the smaller unknown as x and translate the sentence into an equation before choosing the asked part. Final answer is 60.
questions.explanation_method_hi: दूसरा भाग x मानें। पहला भाग = 7x = 420; इसलिए x = 420/7 = 60। अतः answer = 60।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: जब एक quantity दूसरी की multiple हो, smaller unknown को x मानकर equation बनाते हैं और पूछा गया part निकालते हैं। Final answer 60 है।
